description: Conversation where several lines lack clear speaker markers, requiring contextual inference
source_text:
We need to make a decision before the funding runs out.
I know. But rushing this will cost us more in the long run.
You always say that. Meanwhile the board is breathing down my neck.
Fair enough. What's your timeline?
End of the month. Realistically.
That's not enough time.
It has to be enough time.
What if we brought in outside help?
We've been over this. They don't understand the product.
Maybe we don't either, not fully.
